## Checklist
- [ ] `README.md`
- [ ] `theory.md`
- [ ] `cheatsheet.md`
- [ ] `mistakes.md`
- [ ] `revision.md`
- [ ] At least 5 problems in `problems/`, each following `templates/problem_template.md`
- [ ] Root `README.md` Progress Dashboard updated
- [ ] `roadmaps/roadmap.md` updated if sequencing changed
